description: A general-purpose layout primitive for applying spacing, sizing, overflow, and positioning using design-system tokens. Use as a wrapper div or span when you need layout control without flexbox or grid.
instructions: Spacing props (p, m, px, my, etc.) accept design token numbers or pixel strings. Use as='span' to render inline. Use Flex for flex layouts and Grid for grid layouts — Box is for simpler single-element sizing and spacing. All spacing props support responsive objects with breakpoint keys (base, xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl).
name: Box
